# La Mesa — Ceramics Studio & Creative Lab

> La Mesa is a ceramics studio and multidisciplinary creative lab located in La Barceloneta, Barcelona. We offer weekly classes, drop-in sessions, wheel throwing courses, creative workshops and private sessions. Tone: welcoming, informal, community-focused. We are hosts, not teachers.

## Services
- Taller Semanal Modelado (weekly hand-building class): €120/month — 4 sessions of 2h, 1×/week. Book online via Stripe Checkout.
- Taller Semanal Torno (weekly wheel-throwing class): €160/month — 4 sessions of 2h, 1×/week. Book online via Stripe Checkout.
- Clase Suelta Modelado (drop-in hand-building): €50 — minimum 2 hours. Book online via Stripe Checkout.
- Clase Suelta Torno (drop-in wheel, private, max 2 people): €70 — minimum 2 hours. Book online via Stripe Checkout.
- Intro al Torno (wheel intro course): €90 — 2 sessions of 2h, max 2 people. Book via WhatsApp.
- Coworking Torno (open wheel access for experienced potters): €20/hour — minimum 2 hours. Book via WhatsApp.
- Taller Flex (flexible classes for students with prior experience): from €120 (8h). More hours via WhatsApp (https://wa.me/34711552030).
- Creative workshops (with guest artists): variable, see website.
- Private sessions (team building, birthdays, bachelorette): custom quote.

All materials and firings included. High-temperature clay. Full machine-readable pricing: https://lamesabcn.com/pricing.md

## Booking
- Online (Stripe Checkout): Taller Semanal (Modelado/Torno) and Clase Suelta (Modelado/Torno).
- WhatsApp (https://wa.me/34711552030): Intro al Torno, Coworking Torno, Taller Flex, creative workshops and private sessions.

## Location
Carrer de l'Atlàntida 47, La Barceloneta, 08003 Barcelona, Spain

## Contact
- Web: https://lamesabcn.com
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/34711552030
- Email: lamesa.lc@gmail.com
- Instagram: @lamesa.lc

## Shop
- Etsy: https://www.etsy.com/es/shop/LaMesaLC

## Opening Hours
- Tuesday: 14:00–20:30
- Wednesday: 14:00–18:00
- Friday: 11:00–18:00
- Monday: 15:00–17:00

## Languages
Spanish (primary), Catalan, English

## About
Founded by Lau and Vick. La Mesa is not a traditional school — it is a creative space where people come to make things with their hands, connect with others, and slow down. All materials and firings included. High-temperature clay.
